role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of text and remained neutral.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation density, and climate cues.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed forest structure and leaf morphology.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Discussed road width, markings, and infrastructure standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Used camera generation and utility pole styles as differentiators.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline failed to identify the ground truth (Indonesia) because the agents relied on generic 'tropical road' heuristics that favored Central America. The hallucination of specific road marking patterns (yellow center/white edge) to support Costa Rica was the critical error.

regulatory: Claimed 'worn white edge lines' are visible (image shows only gravel shoulders/dirt).
Claimed 'single yellow center line' (image shows a double yellow line).
meta: Claimed 'slight blur patterns' are consistent with Gen 3/4 Google camera (image is sharp).

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described the dense tropical forest.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Failed to accurately describe the road markings (hallucinated white edges, missed double yellow).
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Accurately described the general scene quality.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: The regulatory and meta agents hallucinated visual evidence (white edge lines, specific road quality) to strongly support Costa Rica and contradict Indonesia. The landscape agent also favored Central America. The specialists collectively misled the tournament away from the truth.
